name: property managers handling 10-20 properties tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inconsistent maintenance tracking causes compliance issues. We provide automated compliance monitoring instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules.
problem_solved: Inconsistent property maintenance can lead to compliance issues and potential fines.
